step.title: Generate Makefile / DX goal (single goal, phase=dx)
step.rule: This step is UNCONDITIONAL — every project needs DX commands (make test, make lint, make fix, .env.test).
depends_on MUST include ALL cross-cutting goal IDs — dynamically collected from goals.yaml, excluding phase=gate and phase=scaffold (G-03).
Single goal — never split per-BC. Makefile wraps project-wide quality tooling.

substep.title: Collect all cross-cutting goal IDs
substep.action: Read goals.yaml from disk. Filter all goal entries where phase is NOT gate AND NOT scaffold. Collect their goal IDs into CROSS_CUTTING_GOAL_IDS list.

check.action: Fallback: collect ALL goal IDs from goals.yaml (DX wraps everything). Print warning: "No non-gate/scaffold goals found — using all goal IDs as depends_on"

substep.rule: This MUST be dynamic — goal count varies per project. Never hardcode goal IDs.

substep.title: Derive the coarse deliverable_area
substep.action: Set DX_AREA = the DX deliverable directory in the resolved topology — `./` (repo root), where the Makefile and .env.test the DX goal owns live (project-wide quality tooling, not per-BC). This is a COARSE path (the depinfer produce/consume seed + the elaborator's tree-read anchor), NOT a glob and NOT a per-file path.
substep.rule: Do NOT extract test-environment.md variables, resolve templates, or author any acceptance/validate/investigator/not-in-scope here — those are Tier-2 (/tmux:elaborate authors them at dispatch). The roadmap skeleton commits only to the coarse deliverable_area.

substep.title: Call goal-create MCP (roadmap skeleton)
substep.action: Call the goal-create MCP tool with a roadmap SKELETON:

params.param: Create Makefile with test, lint, fix targets and .env.test file
DX_AREA (coarse, e.g. ./ — repo root where Makefile + .env.test live)
CROSS_CUTTING_GOAL_IDS — ALL non-gate/scaffold goal IDs collected in substep 3.28.1

substep.rule: Description is 60 characters — within the 120-char limit (MaxGoalDescriptionLength).
depends_on MUST be the FULL CROSS_CUTTING_GOAL_IDS list — never subset or phase-filtered (G-03).

NO validate/acceptance/scope/context/investigation_config/not_in_scope params — this is a roadmap skeleton; /tmux:elaborate authors every concrete field at dispatch (design §5/§6). NEVER run `tmux-cli rules match` here.

check.action: Print error with full context and ABORT.
Print: "DX skeleton created: goal-{{DX_GOAL_ID}} (phase=dx, status=roadmap, depends_on={{CROSS_CUTTING_GOAL_IDS}}, deliverable_area={{DX_AREA}})"
